name: Sunrise Trek to Ujjain Temple
description: Experience the spiritual awakening with a guided trek to the ancient Ujjain Temple. This early morning adventure offers breathtaking views and a chance to connect with local culture.
inclusions:
Guided tour
Breakfast
Water bottle
Camera access

name: Mahakal Temple Darshan
description: Visit the sacred Mahakal Temple with an experienced guide. Learn about the rich history and spiritual significance of this 2000-year-old temple.

name: Adventure Water Sports
description: Thrilling water sports activities including kayaking, jet skiing, and paddleboarding on the pristine waters of Ujjain.

name: Khajuraho Temple Complex Tour
description: Explore the stunning medieval temples of Khajuraho with intricate stone carvings and architectural marvels. A UNESCO World Heritage Site.
inclusions:
Guided tour
Entry fee
Audio guide
Snacks

name: Sunset at Ken River
description: Watch the golden sunset over the Ken River while enjoying traditional local snacks and cultural performances.

name: Varanasi Ghats Evening Aarti
description: Witness the mesmerizing evening prayer ceremony at the sacred Varanasi Ghats. A spiritual and cultural experience like no other.

name: Ganges River Boat Cruise
description: Peaceful boat cruise on the holy Ganges River with opportunities to see local wildlife and traditional fishing methods.

name: Jaipur City Palace Tour
description: Explore the magnificent City Palace, a blend of Mughal and Indian architecture. Learn about the royal heritage of Jaipur.
inclusions:
Guided tour
Entry fee
Audio guide

name: Hawa Mahal Photography Tour
description: Professional photography tour of the iconic Hawa Mahal (Palace of Winds) with tips from experienced photographers.

name: Desert Camel Safari
description: Experience the Thar Desert on camelback with traditional Rajasthani hospitality. Includes sunset views and cultural performances.
inclusions:
Camel ride
Guide
Dinner
Cultural show
Bonfire
